afterMs.description: Test-clock offset (ms from flow start) at which the reply is delivered (time-skip advances between offsets).

stepId.description: The `external-task` step id this reply targets.

correlationId.description: The correlation id the reply carries; it correlates only when it equals the id injected on submit (`case_id '/' step.id`, §11.1).

messageId.description: The reply's own message id; `(correlationId, messageId)` is the Idempotent-Receiver dedup key (§11.1).

value.description: The validated response value written to the step's `out` variable (ignored for a `malformed` reply).

malformed.description: When true, the reply fails response-schema validation → **DLQ + Case surfacing**, never resume (doc 04 §2.8 taxonomy).

description:
A scripted **inbound correlated reply** a conformance vector delivers to an `external-task` step
(doc 04 §2.8, doc 05 §11.1) — the machine analog of a `FlowSignal.resolve`. Stands in for the mock
external system's response (no live system, doc 13 §2.d): it is routed to the waiting delegation by
`correlationId`, **deduped** on `(correlationId, messageId)`, and validated — a `malformed` reply is
a schema-invalid response the delegation quarantines to the **DLQ** and surfaces on the Case.
